plugins.name: logreader-mcp
plugins.description: openpilot route analysis + panda safety debugger as an MCP server: read cereal and CAN, decode DBC signals, events and engagement, anomaly scan, and find the exact safety source line that blocks each panda TX.

plugins.name: mici-ui-mcp
plugins.description: Drive the openpilot UI locally as an MCP server: launch the UI on a private headless display, screenshot it, and inject touch (tap, swipe, long-press) to build and validate UI changes without a device. Optionally replay a route for the onroad UI.
